arts.ttl: Ancelotti set to shuffle his pack as Real Madrid face Villarreal in La Liga
arts.sum: Speaking pre-game, Madrid boss Ancelotti acknowledged the drain on his player’s energy levels: " Tomorrow we’ll have to make an extraordinary effort . Lucas Vázquez and Fran García will cover the right and left back positions completing a starting line up that could see: Courtois; Lucas Vázquez, Asencio, Alaba, Fran García; Tchouameni, Camavinga; Brahim, Bellingham, Rodrygo and Mbappé start for ‘Los Blancos’.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid identify five top transfer targets, including Liverpool star & Tottenham duo
arts.sum: Real Madrid have reportedly put together a list of around five transfer targets for this summer, which includes big names from Liverpool and Tottenham. As has been widely reported for some time now, the Spanish giants are keen to snap up Liverpool’s Trent Alexander-Arnold on a free transfer this summer. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta delivers fitness update on Bukayo Saka as the Arsenal winger bids to return from three-month absence ahead of Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has issued an update on Bukayo Saka's injury status, as the Arsenal winger has missed almost three months of action with a hamstring issue.

arts.ttl: Neymar ruled out of Brazil return, Endrick in
arts.sum: Neymar's return to action for Brazil will be delayed yet longer after the forward was ruled out of his country's squad for upcoming World Cup qualifiers on Friday due to a thigh injury.

arts.ttl: Injured Neymar replaced by Endrick in Brazil squad
arts.sum: Brazil call up teenage forward Endrick to replace Neymar for this month's World Cup qualifiers after the Santos attacker picks up a muscle injury.

arts.sum: Manchester City head coach Pep Guardiola has moved to reveal his appreciation for the efforts of Diego Simeone’s Atlético Madrid, en route to being sent packing from the Champions League…
